reasoning: As of August 31, 2025, official statements from the 'Coalition of the Willing' consistently emphasize that the Multinational Force Ukraine (MFU) will only deploy 'once hostilities have ceased' or following a concrete peace agreement to act as a reassurance force. Mid-August peace talks in Turkey were inconclusive, and the highly anticipated August 15-16 summit between Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin in Alaska ended without a ceasefire or breakthrough. With no end to hostilities in sight and only four months remaining in 2025, the timeline to achieve a solid ceasefire and physically deploy troops under a new multinational command in 2025 is exceedingly tight. Even if a peace settlement is reached in late 2025, logistical mobilization into Ukraine would likely spill over into 2026. Therefore, the probability of deployment occurring before December 31, 2025 is very low.
